• Execution
  • Communication Plan
    • Defined cadence for status updates, stakeholder communications, and reporting channels.
  • Complete Gantt Chart and Schedule Integration
    • A fully formatted Gantt chart showing dependencies, durations, and milestones without formatting errors.
  • Change Management and Post-Prototype Roadmap
    • Approach for evaluating adjustments, scaling options, and transitioning from prototype to production phases.
  • to touring/streaming contexts.
  • Creatively authentic live experiences where no two shows are the same.
